- Full House: 25 points
- Small Straight: 30 points
- Large Straight: 40 points
- Yacht: 50 points
- Aces through Sixes: sum of dice showing that number
- Three-of-a-Kind / Four-of-a-Kind: sum of all dice if the dice qualify
- Upper section bonus: +35 when the sum of Aces through Sixes is 63 or more

Round 1: [2, 6, 5, 1, 3]
Round 2: [3, 5, 1, 1, 3]
Round 3: [1, 1, 4, 5, 6]
Round 4: [4, 5, 5, 6, 4]
Round 5: [4, 3, 2, 2, 3]
Round 6: [1, 6, 2, 3, 2]
Round 7: [3, 3, 3, 3, 4]
Round 8: [6, 6, 3, 4, 6]
Round 9: [6, 3, 4, 6, 1]
Round 10: [6, 3, 3, 5, 2]
Round 11: [2, 1, 3, 3, 6]
Round 12: [5, 2, 5, 6, 6]

Compute the optimal assignment. If additional instructions below specify particular rounds, report only the requested partial sum—not the full 12-round total.

IMPORTANT — Spotcheck grading (not the full 12-round total):
First compute an optimal assignment that maximizes the usual total score over all 12 rounds (same rules and bonus as always). Using that optimal assignment, output ONLY the sum of the per-round scores for rounds 2, 4, 5, 6, 9, 10, 11, 12. Your final line must be exactly `Answer: <integer>` with that partial sum.
